subject: Fix mount point for SCH tls-init container
commit_message:
Fix mount point for SCH tls-init container

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2177
Signed-off-by: Jack Lucas <jflucas@research.att.com>
Change-Id: I470ba4fbcb0521069eda8b3296fe303c1b3c90b5

> Is it the root cause of the bootstrap failures?

No, this is an unrelated bug fix.
The bootstrap error looks to me like a transient problem in the environment.  We don't see it elsewhere.
